mapper.select: SELECT ntc_idx AS idx, ntc_uuid AS uuid, ttl, cntnt, view_cnt, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, del_at FROM tb_ntc WHERE ntc_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
SELECT ntc_idx AS idx, ntc_uuid AS uuid, ttl, cntnt, view_cnt, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, del_at FROM tb_ntc WHERE ntc_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
SELECT ntc_idx AS idx, ntc_uuid AS uuid, ttl, cntnt, view_cnt, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, del_at FROM tb_ntc WHERE ntc_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ntc WHERE del_at IS NULL
AND ttl LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.kwd}, '%')
SELECT ntc_idx AS idx, ntc_uuid AS uuid, ttl, view_cnt, created_by, created_at FROM tb_ntc WHERE del_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ntc SET ttl = #{ttl}, cntnt = #{cntnt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE ntc_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_ntc SET del_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE ntc_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_ntc SET view_cnt = view_cnt + 1 WHERE ntc_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
